search.query:
source: instance_bill and ProductCode:fc | SELECT
         CASE
                  WHEN rnk1 =1 THEN region
                  ELSE ''
         END AS region ,
         billingitem                                                            AS "计费项",
                  Concat(Cast( Round(usage,3) AS VARCHAR),' (' , usageunit,')') AS "用量",
         "费用",
                  Concat(Cast(Round(feepercent,3) AS VARCHAR) ,'%') AS "同比上月"
FROM    (
                  SELECT   *,
                           Sum("费用") OVER(partition BY region)                        AS regionfee,
                           Rank() OVER(partition BY region ORDER BY "费用" DESC)        AS rnk1
                  FROM     (
                                  SELECT region,
                                         billingitem,
                                         usagediff[1]         as usage,
                                         usagediff[3]*100-100 AS usagepercent,
                                         usageunit,
                                         feediff[1]         AS "费用",
                                         feediff[3]*100-100 AS feepercent
                                  FROM  (
                                                  SELECT   region,
                                                           billingitem,
                                                           compare(usage,2592000)    AS usagediff,
                                                           Arbitrary(usageunit)      AS usageunit,
                                                           Compare("费用",2592000) AS feediff
                                                  from    (
                                                                    SELECT   region ,
                                                                             billingitem,
                                                                             sum(usage)                 AS usage,
                                                                             arbitrary(usageunit)       AS usageunit,
                                                                             round(sum(pretaxamount),3) AS "费用"
                                                                    FROM     log
                                                                    GROUP BY region,
                                                                             billingitem )
                                                  GROUP BY region,
                                                           billingitem ) ) )
ORDER BY regionfee DESC,
         "费用" DESC limit 1000

         CASE
                  WHEN rnk1 =1 THEN region
                  ELSE ''
         END AS region ,
         billingitem                                                            AS "计费项",

         "费用",
                  Concat(Cast(Round(feepercent,3) AS VARCHAR) ,'%') AS "同比上月"
FROM    (
                  SELECT   *,
                           Sum("费用") OVER(partition BY region)                        AS regionfee,
                           Rank() OVER(partition BY region ORDER BY "费用" DESC)        AS rnk1
                  FROM     (
                                  SELECT region,
                                         billingitem,
                                         usagediff[1]         as usage,
                                         usagediff[3]*100-100 AS usagepercent,
                                         usageunit,
                                         feediff[1]         AS "费用",
                                         feediff[3]*100-100 AS feepercent
                                  FROM  (
                                                  SELECT   region,
                                                           billingitem,
                                                           compare(usage,2592000)    AS usagediff,
                                                           Arbitrary(usageunit)      AS usageunit,
                                                           Compare("费用",2592000) AS feediff
                                                  from    (
                                                                    SELECT   region ,
                                                                             billingitem,
                                                                             sum(usage)                 AS usage,
                                                                             arbitrary(usageunit)       AS usageunit,
                                                                             round(sum(pretaxamount),3) AS "费用"
                                                                    FROM     log
                                                                    GROUP BY region,
                                                                             billingitem )
                                                  GROUP BY region,
                                                           billingitem ) ) )
ORDER BY regionfee DESC,
         "费用" DESC limit 1000

search.query: source: instance_bill and ProductCode:fc | select Region , round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "费用" group by Region  order by "费用" desc
search.tokenQuery: source: instance_bill and ProductCode:oss | select Region , round(sum(PretaxGrossAmount),3) as "费用" group by Region  order by "费用" desc

search.query: source:bill  and  ProductCode:fc | select  date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d') as "日期",  round(sum(PretaxAmount),3)  as "金额"  group by "日期" order by "日期"
search.tokenQuery: source:bill  and  ProductCode:oss | select  date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d') as "日期",  round(sum(PretaxAmount),3)  as "金额"  group by "日期" order by "日期"

search.query: source:bill and ProductCode:fc | select t as  "时间", "金额" from(select *,min(t) over() as mt from( select  date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m') as t,  round(sum(PretaxAmount),3)  as "金额"  from log group by t order by t)) where t > mt
search.tokenQuery: source:bill and ProductCode:ECS | select t as  "时间", "金额" from(select *,min(t) over() as mt from( select  date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m') as t,  round(sum(PretaxAmount),3)  as "金额"  from log group by t order by t)) where t > mt

search.query: source:bill  and PretaxAmount> 0 and ProductCode:fc | select round(di[1],3) as "当天费用",di[2] as "前日费用",round(di[3]*100-100,3) as percent from(select compare(fee, 86400) as di  from(select  sum(PretaxAmount) as fee from log))
search.tokenQuery: source:bill not abcd and PretaxAmount> 0 and ecs | select round(di[1],3) as "当天费用",di[2] as "前日费用",di[3]*100-100 as percent from(select compare(fee, 86400) as di  from(select  sum(PretaxAmount) as fee from log))
